preamble.title: protofire/dia-cardano-oracle
preamble.description: Aiken contracts for the DIA Cardano Oracle project

cardano/address/Address.title: Address
cardano/address/Address.description:
A Cardano `Address` typically holding one or two credential references.

 Note that legacy bootstrap addresses (a.k.a. 'Byron addresses') are
 completely excluded from Plutus contexts. Thus, from an on-chain
 perspective only exists addresses of type 00, 01, ..., 07 as detailed
 in [CIP-0019 :: Shelley Addresses](https://github.com/cardano-foundation/CIPs/tree/master/CIP-0019/#shelley-addresses).

cardano/address/Credential.title: Credential
cardano/address/Credential.description:
A general structure for representing an on-chain `Credential`.

 Credentials are always one of two kinds: a direct public/private key
 pair, or a script (native or Plutus).

cardano/address/PaymentCredential.title: PaymentCredential
cardano/address/PaymentCredential.description:
A general structure for representing an on-chain `Credential`.

 Credentials are always one of two kinds: a direct public/private key
 pair, or a script (native or Plutus).

cardano/address/StakeCredential.title: StakeCredential
cardano/address/StakeCredential.description:
Represent a type of object that can be represented either inline (by hash)
 or via a reference (i.e. a pointer to an on-chain location).

 This is mainly use for capturing pointers to a stake credential
 registration certificate in the case of so-called pointer addresses.

cardano/transaction/OutputReference.title: OutputReference
cardano/transaction/OutputReference.description:
An `OutputReference` is a unique reference to an output on-chain. The `output_index`
 corresponds to the position in the output list of the transaction (identified by its id)
 that produced that output

dia_cardano_oracle/config_logic/ConfigDa.title: ConfigDatum
dia_cardano_oracle/config_logic/ConfigDa.description:
Configuration datum for the DIA Cardano Oracle protocol.
 Controls administrative settings, fee structure, and cross-chain parameters.

fields.title: config_admins
fields.description: List of admin verification key hashes authorized to update config.

fields.title: authorized_dia_public_keys
fields.description: List of authorized DIA secp256k1 public keys for intent signatures.

fields.title: domain_data
fields.description: EIP-712 domain data for Ethereum signature verification.

fields.title: base_fee_lovelace
fields.description:
Base protocol fee in lovelace (constant component).
 Formula: protocol_fee(N) = base_fee_lovelace + (N * per_pair_fee_lovelace)

fields.title: per_pair_fee_lovelace
fields.description:
Per-pair protocol fee in lovelace (variable component per pair).
 Formula: protocol_fee(N) = base_fee_lovelace + (N * per_pair_fee_lovelace)

fields.title: payment_hook_ref
fields.description: Reference to the global PaymentHook UTxO (if enabled).

fields.title: update_coordinator_credential
fields.description: Credential of the update coordinator script (if enabled).

fields.title: max_bootstrap_drift_seconds
fields.description: Maximum time drift in seconds for intent freshness validation.

fields.title: min_utxo_lovelace
fields.description: Minimum lovelace required for protocol UTxOs.

dia_cardano_oracle/coordinator_logic/Coo.title: CoordinatorRedeemer
dia_cardano_oracle/coordinator_logic/Coo.description:
The coordinator's three execution branches. This type is the single
 source of truth for what cross-script intent a tx is expressing.

 Subscripts (`receiver`, `pair_state`, `payment_hook`) MUST verify both
 the coordinator's presence in the tx AND that the redeemer it is
 running with names the script's own UTxO. Otherwise an attacker can
 piggy-back on an unrelated coordinator branch and slip a tampered
 transition past a subscript's local checks (cross-script
 redeemer-confusion).

dia_cardano_oracle/coordinator_logic/Set.title: SettleManifest
dia_cardano_oracle/coordinator_logic/Set.description: Manifest passed to the coordinator's `ApplySettle` redeemer.

dia_cardano_oracle/coordinator_logic/Set.title: SettleReceiver
dia_cardano_oracle/coordinator_logic/Set.description: Identity of a Receiver UTxO referenced by a Settle manifest entry.

anyOf.title: UpdateMinUtxo
anyOf.description:
Admin-only update of the min_utxo_lovelace field.
 Requires config signer authorization at the validator level.

anyOf.title: ApplyUpdate
anyOf.description:
Spent during an oracle update (single or batch). The script body
 is intentionally minimal: NFT continuity, exact ADA locking, and
 cross-script redeemer-confusion defence via
 `coordinator_in_update_mode`. Datum semantics, signature recovery,
 freshness, intent expiry, receiver presence, and one-input-per-
 witness accounting are all enforced once by `update_coordinator`
 — duplicating them here would multiply that cost by N pair scripts
 inside a batch.

anyOf.title: UpdateMinUtxo
anyOf.description: Admin-only update of min_utxo_lovelace. Requires config signer authorization.
